final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: educational knowledge card for children
Primary request: single large knowledge card explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era
Scene/backdrop: clean white background with subtle decorative borders suitable for children's educational materials
Subject: cartoon-style illustrated narrative of the Battle of Red Cliffs showing key moments: fire attack, chained ships, Zhuge Liang's strategy, and the final victory
Style/medium: flat vector illustration, cartoon storybook style, child-friendly character designs
Composition/framing: top-down layout with clear title banner at top, main story illustration in center, bullet-point summary on the side
Lighting/mood: bright and cheerful, welcoming educational tone
Color palette: warm oranges and reds for fire elements, cool blues for water and sky, soft earth tones for characters
Materials/textures: smooth vector graphics, no realistic textures
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: title must be prominent and readable, bullet points must be clearly separated with punctuation, story must progress logically from left to right
Avoid: scary or violent imagery, complex historical details unsuitable for children, cluttered layout, realistic gore or weapons
